validations.name: input_inventory_completeness
validations.evidence: All 6 mandatory file-based inputs present and readable. SHA-256 checksums recorded. No missing inputs. FC not triggered.

validations.name: source_authority_conformity
validations.evidence: All input files are from the authoritative path set defined in the 43.33 execution contract. No additional files treated as authoritative. Provenance support files (43.32/validation_log.json, 43.32/replay_record.md) used only for checksum verification, not as authoritative inputs.

validations.name: upstream_artifact_verified
validations.evidence: docs/pios/43.3/validated_binding_payload.json loaded. Input file SHA-256 (authoritative): 71c628d1ce0e4dd80800eaafe84ae3e5a922302adba9543d44f07ddad3c8aa7b. Embedded artifact_checksum field (binding array integrity seal, distinct from file checksum): 25c2e9dc04dd6f06dacf4a6f973b6b2306c15067aa9e5d09a24b9d4783009f69 — confirmed as internal field value. All 5 per-record checksums verified. All 5 records validation_status=VALID. contract_version=43.31-v1 confirmed.

validations.name: upstream_binding_continuity
validations.evidence: upstream_binding_checksum 71c628d1... (authoritative file-level SHA-256 of docs/pios/43.3/validated_binding_payload.json) recorded in artifact envelope and in all 5 per-record upstream_artifact_checksum fields. Binding lineage is traceable from each projection record to the exact 43.3 artifact file that produced the upstream binding.

validations.name: node_resolution_all_records
validations.evidence: Rule 44.2-NR-001 PASS for all 5 records. Each node_id carried from upstream binding record. All 5 node_ids previously confirmed present in pie_vault/02_Capabilities/ with exact filename stem match (confirmed in 43.32). No re-resolution required; upstream record already passed 43.3-SV-001. No heuristic or approximate resolution.

validations.name: binding_identity_preserved
validations.evidence: Rule 44.2-BI-001 PASS for all 5 records. signal_reference and node_reference carried verbatim from upstream binding records. No transformation, normalization, annotation, or extension applied.

validations.name: evidence_linkage_preserved
validations.evidence: Rule 44.2-EL-001 PASS for all 5 records. evidence_reference populated from evidence_embedding of upstream binding record. All 4 evidence fields present: association_basis, provenance_chain, source_reference, temporal_reference. Provenance chain not abbreviated, summarized, or modified.

validations.name: one_binding_to_one_node
validations.evidence: Rule 44.2-OB-001 PASS for all 5 records. Each of the 5 upstream binding records produces exactly 1 projection record. No duplication, splitting, or merging. 5 inputs → 5 outputs, one-to-one.

validations.name: no_content_transformation
validations.evidence: Rule 44.2-NT-001 PASS for all 5 records. No interpretation content, narrative constructs, inferred meaning, aggregation, fusion, or rendering instructions introduced. No emphasis field introduced; no emphasis logic applied.

validations.name: record_schema_completeness
validations.evidence: All required per-record fields present in all 5 records: attachment_id, attachment_status, binding_id, contract_version, emphasis, evidence_reference, node_reference, projection_reference, signal_reference, source_snapshot_reference, upstream_artifact_checksum, validation_trace, checksum.

validations.name: provenance_completeness
validations.evidence: All 4 evidence_reference fields present and non-null in all 5 records: association_basis, provenance_chain, source_reference, temporal_reference. Provenance chain traces to 40.x origin for each signal.

validations.name: validation_trace_completeness
validations.evidence: All 5 records contain 5-entry validation_trace. Rule IDs present in all records: 44.2-NR-001, 44.2-BI-001, 44.2-EL-001, 44.2-OB-001, 44.2-NT-001. All results = PASS.

validations.name: contract_version_all_records
validations.evidence: All 5 records carry contract_version: 43.31-v1. Artifact envelope carries contract_version: 43.31-v1.

validations.name: per_record_checksums
validations.evidence: SHA-256 recomputed for all 5 records (canonical JSON, sort_keys, no whitespace, excluding checksum field). All recomputed checksums match stored values: SIG-001=0b920378..., SIG-002=56f1fd58..., SIG-003=7e278b98..., SIG-004=9b205b02..., SIG-005=8213dc93...

validations.name: artifact_level_checksum
validations.evidence: Artifact-level SHA-256 recomputed on full projections array. Recomputed matches stored artifact_checksum exactly: bf20bec6f01dbca39e44233187214239e450e041e0f48516f5b016c890d090e8.

validations.name: deterministic_ordering
validations.evidence: Records sorted lexicographically by attachment_id confirmed. Ordering is identical to sort(attachment_id, ascending). FC-non-deterministic-ordering not triggered.

validations.name: canonical_path_correct
validations.evidence: artifact_path = docs/pios/44.2/projection_attachment.json matches required canonical path.

validations.name: replay_readiness
validations.evidence: Replay record produced at docs/pios/43.33/replay_record.md with exact input checksums, execution timestamp, deterministic ordering rule, per-record checksums, artifact checksum, and replay equivalence conditions. All information required for governed-equivalent reproduction is present.
